nodes.label: Central sandbox registry.  `SandboxService` is the single authority for sandbox
A daemon-owned SSH local port-forward for one dashboard.
Owns sandbox persistence and delegates provisioning to a backend.
Read-only poll target. Never provisions; reconciles stale state.
Describe the hardware the agent can request from the active backend.          La
Read the experiment's terminal transcript.          Supports incremental polling
Reconciled sandbox row for an experiment, or None if none exists.
All sandbox rows for a project (most-recent first).
Full backend health payload (the slim ``health`` tool trims this).
Sample live in-container usage (CPU/RAM/GPU) for a running sandbox.          Rea
Bring a row in line with reality. Read-only-safe (never provisions).          -
Return the in-flight job for this experiment, or start a fresh one.          Ide
Background worker: sync → create → tunnel, updating the row per phase.
Best-effort terminate any sandbox tied to this experiment.          Covers both
Signal all in-flight provisioning jobs to stop (best-effort).
Terminate every running sandbox whose expires_at deadline has passed.          I
Re-read the encrypted dashboard tunnel URLs and persist if changed.          Com
Expose in-sandbox dashboards through daemon-owned SSH local forwards.          M
Re-read a live sandbox's SSH tunnel and persist it if it moved.          Recover
Inverse of _mark_experiment_running, for a sandbox reaped at expiry.          Wi
Ask the backend what hardware can be requested (best-effort shape).          Bac
